title: CVE-2022-36309 — CVSS 8.8 (HIGH)
content:
# CVE-2022-36309

CVSS Score: 8.8 (HIGH)
Published: 2022-08-16T01:15:13.707
CWEs: CWE-78, CWE-78

Airspan AirVelocity 1500 software versions prior to 15.18.00.2511 have a root command injection vulnerability in the ActiveBank parameter of the recoverySubmit.cgi script running on the eNodeB's web management UI. This issue may affect other AirVelocity and AirSpeed models.

References: https://github.com/metaredteam/external-disclosures/security/advisories/GHSA-p295-2jh6-g6g4, https://helpdesk.airspan.com/browse/TRN3-1690, https://github.com/metaredteam/external-disclosures/security/advisories/GHSA-p295-2jh6-g6g4
